examples: "It is about the flashiness and the gadgets," said John Curran, managing director of research at Accenture.
Some will also be irritated by the show-offy flashiness of his prose and the extreme certainty of his predictions.
Besides being cheap, these have the advantage that previous research has shown that a male's level of flashiness in the eyes of a female can be manipulated by putting coloured rings on his legs.
